---
name: Performance enhancement
about: Suggest an optimization to improve speed, memory use, or responsiveness
title: "[Performance]: "
labels: ["enhancement", "performance"]
assignees: ["aritraroy24"]
---

## Performance Goal

Describe the performance improvement you want.

## Current Behavior

What is currently slow or resource-heavy?

## Expected Improvement

What outcome do you expect (for example: faster preview load, lower memory usage)?

## Reproduction / Scenario

1. Open file `...`
2. Trigger action `...`
3. Observe slowdown

## Scope

- Affected file type(s):
- Affected area(s): (parser, preview pane, renderer, thumbnail, context menu, installer)
- Frequency: (always / often / occasional)

## Measurements (Optional)

Provide before/after metrics if available:

- Load/render time:
- CPU usage:
- Memory usage:
- File size / atom count / grid size:
- Machine specs:

## Proposed Approach (Optional)

Describe any implementation idea you have.

## Additional Context

Screenshots, sample files, logs, or profiling notes.
